ddls:
CREATE TABLE "medical_devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_code" TEXT /* Unique code assigned to the device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the medical device */,
  "min_usage" REAL /* Minimum usage parameter of the device */,
  "mode_usage" REAL /* Mode usage parameter of the device */,
  "max_usage" REAL /* Maximum usage parameter of the device */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes about the device */,
  "device_category" TEXT /* Category of the medical device */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the medical device */,
  "model_number" TEXT /* Model number of the medical device */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the medical device */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date when the medical device was purchased */,
  "warranty_period" INTEGER /* Warranty period of the medical device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "facilities" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each facility */,
  "facility_name" TEXT /* Name of the healthcare facility */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the facility */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the facility */,
  "facility_type" TEXT /* Type of healthcare facility */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the facility */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility where the inventory is stored */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the medical device */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the device in inventory */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the inventory record was last updated */,
  "storage_location" TEXT /* Storage location of the medical devices within a facility */,
  "inventory_status" TEXT /* Status of the inventory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES medical_devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage event */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility where the device is used */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the medical device */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date when the device was used */,
  "usage_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the device was used */,
  "usage_type" TEXT /* Type of usage */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who used the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_usage_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_usage_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_usage_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES medical_devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance event */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the medical device */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date when the maintenance was performed */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance performed */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes about the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_status" TEXT /* Status of the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_performed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES medical_devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_maintenance_performed_by FOREIGN KEY ("maintenance_performed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility where the user works */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the user's role */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department where the user belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "access_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the system was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device version */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the medical device */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the device specifications */,
  "specification_changes" TEXT /* Description of changes in the specifications */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the version became effective */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version changes */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_versions_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES medical_devices ("device_id")
)
